product.name: ArDura 500
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for military applications, motorcyclists clothing. Also special solutions where need high rubbing resistance.
product.titleDescriptor: Pa6.6 woven fabric for Military wear and bag
product.specLine: 240 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Waterproof, Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArDura 500 is lightweight 100% polyamide 6.6 woven fabric for military wear and equippments.
It is EN ISO EN343 certified for waterproof
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability and water resistance.
Pa6.6 woven fabric for Military wear and bag
240 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Waterproof, Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>3000N; Weft>2000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>250N; Weft>200N | EN ISO 13937-4
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1

acceptedMatches.rationale: Product data explicitly and repeatedly states military wear, equipment and application, directly matching the military taxonomy.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Category source group mentions motorcyclists clothing for PA 6.6 abrasion-resistant fabrics generally, but this specific product's descriptions focus exclusively on military use without explicit motorcycle application.
